prompt_text:
### Demographics: 44-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 5 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after hyperglycemia symptoms (polyuria, polydipsia, weight loss)
Current symptoms: Rare nocturnal hypoglycemia (1 episode in 3 months); no DKA/HHS signs

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 5 (0-15) (Dialysis: Hemodialysis)
Heart failure: HFpEF (NYHA Class II)
ASCVD: Coronary artery disease (History of CABG); Peripheral artery disease
MASH
Body mass index category: Obese Class I
Frailty with Mobility Impairment
Chronic Obstructive Pulmonary Disease
Major Depressive Disorder
Recurrent Complicated Urinary Tract Infections
Psychotic Disorder on Atypical Antipsychotics
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 5 (0-15) (Dialysis: Hemodialysis); HF: HFpEF (NYHA Class II); ASCVD: Coronary artery disease (History of CABG); Peripheral artery disease; MASLD: MASH; BMI Category: Obese Class I
- Family history: Family history of type 2 diabetes not assessed
- Social history: Current smoker (15 cigarettes/day for 15 years; ~11.2 pack-years); Alcohol 3-4 drinks/week (2-3 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Semaglutide 1mg once weekly; Quetiapine (150 mg nightly), Sertraline (50 mg daily), Fluticasone/salmeterol Inhaler (twice daily), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Losartan (50 mg daily), Ciprofloxacin (500 mg twice daily for 7 days)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 66.9 kg; Height 162.6 cm; BMI 25.3 kg/m²; Blood pressure 140/75 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 7.5%; 9 months ago 7.2%; 6 months ago 6.9%; 3 months ago 7.2%; current 6.0%), FPG (12 months ago 165mg/dL; 9 months ago 167mg/dL; 6 months ago 137mg/dL; 3 months ago 186mg/dL; current 119mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 66.7kg; 9 months ago 64.9kg; 6 months ago 63.9kg; 3 months ago 62.9kg; current 66.9kg), Height (12 months ago 162.6cm; 9 months ago 162.6cm; 6 months ago 162.6cm; 3 months ago 162.6cm; current 162.6cm), BMI (12 months ago 25.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 25.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 24.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 24.0kg/m²; current 25.3kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 139mmHg; 9 months ago 139mmHg; 6 months ago 134mmHg; 3 months ago 137mmHg; current 140mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 73mmHg; 9 months ago 76mmHg; 6 months ago 74mmHg; 3 months ago 73mmHg; current 75mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 118U/L; 9 months ago 119U/L; 6 months ago 120U/L; 3 months ago 126U/L; current 118U/L), AST (12 months ago 49U/L; 9 months ago 43U/L; 6 months ago 45U/L; 3 months ago 52U/L; current 46U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.6mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.6mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.6mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.6mg/dL; current 0.7mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 8.0mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 10mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 9.1mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 5.2mL/min/1.73m²; current 6mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 512mg/g; 9 months ago 486mg/g; 6 months ago 714mg/g; 3 months ago 706mg/g; current 632mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 91mg/dL; 9 months ago 92mg/dL; 6 months ago 98mg/dL; 3 months ago 99mg/dL; current 95mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 58mg/dL; 9 months ago 57mg/dL; 6 months ago 58mg/dL; 3 months ago 60mg/dL; current 59mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 112mg/dL; 9 months ago 94mg/dL; 6 months ago 116mg/dL; 3 months ago 98mg/dL; current 105mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 13.0g/dL; 9 months ago 13.0g/dL; 6 months ago 12.2g/dL; 3 months ago 11.4g/dL; current 11.4g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Negative (Current); fasting C-peptide 0.61 ng/mL (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Excellent adherence (estimated ≥90%); SMBG 4-5 times/week; diet/exercise well controlled.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
